headerDisplay: Reads a Luftdaten / Sensor.Community (airrohr) sensor — local-first, with a cloud fallback. Provide a **Local URL** and/or a **Sensor ID** (at least one is required).
footerDisplay: See the [README](https://github.com/rafalr100/homebridge-luftdaten) for details. Pressure is logged but not exposed to HomeKit.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name shown in the Home app.

localUrl.title: Local URL
localUrl.description: The sensor's local data endpoint. Tried first.

sensorId.title: Sensor.Community Sensor ID
sensorId.description: Numeric ID of the SDS011 sensor, used for the cloud fallback when the local read fails.

pollInterval.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to read the sensor.

hasTempSensor.title: Has temperature / humidity sensor
hasTempSensor.description: Add temperature and humidity services (SHT3X / BME280). Turn off for an SDS011-only sensor.
